summary: Applied ADR 0238 on the live Windmill operator access surface by replacing the roster table with AG Grid Community, tying raw-app seeding to the active worktree, extracting a lightweight Windmill helper client that works under plain python, replaying the full Windmill converge from the isolated ws-0238 worktree, and re-verifying the live app, helper, workers, and schedule contracts end to end before rebasing the branch cleanly onto the current origin/main 0.177.65 baseline.

verification.check: Focused repo validation and raw app compile
verification.observed: `uv run --with-requirements requirements/api-gateway.txt --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_windmill_circuit_clients.py tests/test_runbook_use_cases.py tests/test_world_state_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_api_gateway.py -q` passed with `75 passed in 14.90s`. `python3 -m py_compile platform/scheduler/__init__.py platform/scheduler/windmill_client.py platform/scheduler/scheduler.py scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py` passed, and the isolated raw-app bundle check `tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)" && mkdir -p "$tmpdir/f/lv3" && rsync -a config/windmill/apps/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app/ "$tmpdir/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app/" && cd "$tmpdir/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app" && npm ci && npx tsc --noEmit` completed successfully.

verification.check: Windmill workflow automation and validation gates
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-windmill`, `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-windmill`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces agent-standards yaml json role-argument-specs ansible-syntax data-models`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, and `uv run --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check` all passed after the ws-0238 ownership manifest was expanded to include the helper, scheduler, runbook, and test surfaces touched during the live apply. `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check` was also exercised and reported the expected stale `docs/diagrams/agent-coordination-map.excalidraw` output, which remains deferred to the protected mainline integration step.

verification.check: Replayed Windmill converge from the isolated ws-0238 worktree
verification.observed: `make converge-windmill` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0238-live-apply` with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=238 changed=48 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=63 changed=1 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`. The successful run copied the repo-managed app sync root, installed raw-app dependencies, pushed the raw app, converged schedules, and passed the seeded Windmill healthcheck plus validation-gate checks.

verification.check: Live AG Grid operator app payload
verification.observed: `GET /api/w/lv3/apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin` returned the private app path `f/lv3/operator_access_admin`, and the live `/App.tsx` plus `/index.css` payloads matched the repo worktree byte-for-byte with SHA-256 digests `28cf832f72acc530dac34969606cd159bdf8cf0a7d2e4ca6c1b88908ee8571de` and `757196bc56686487a2b516461fe5a50514cec4445b7111a5aa5fec75ad8cfc05`.

verification.check: Live helper, worker, and roster contracts
verification.observed: `ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible -i inventory/hosts.yml docker-runtime-lv3 -m shell -a 'docker compose --file /opt/windmill/docker-compose.yml ps' --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` showed `windmill_server`, `windmill_extra`, `windmill_worker`, and `windmill_worker_native` all `Up`, with `windmill-openbao-agent` `healthy`. `python3 scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py --base-url http://100.64.0.1:8005 --workspace lv3 --path f/lv3/windmill_healthcheck --payload-json '{"probe":"plain-python-verify"}'` returned the expected healthcheck payload, and `python3 scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py --base-url http://100.64.0.1:8005 --workspace lv3 --path f/lv3/operator_roster --payload-json '{}'` returned `status: ok` with `operator_count: 1` and the expected sanitized operator keys.

`GET /api/w/lv3/schedules/get/f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop_every_10s` returned `enabled: true`, `is_flow: false`, `script_path: f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop`, and the repo-managed summary and description. `GET /api/w/lv3/schedules/get/f/lv3/world_state/refresh_container_inventory_every_minute` returned `enabled: true`, the repo-managed summary and description, `script_path: f/lv3/world_state/refresh_container_inventory`, and the corrected runtime `dsn` args instead of the earlier manual probe placeholders.

notes: The initial live replay exposed a stale raw-app source-path bug: `/opt/windmill/seed-apps/f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app/package.json` still reflected the older TanStack dependency set because `windmill_seed_app_repo_root_local_dir` was still anchored to the shared checkout. This workstream fixed that by deriving the raw-app staging root from `windmill_worker_checkout_repo_root_local_dir`.

The first replay after the source-root repair then hit a transient guest-side Docker failure during `docker run ... npm ci` with `error waiting for container: unexpected EOF`. A direct repro succeeded immediately afterward, and the role now retries both the raw-app dependency install and `wmill sync push` before failing the converge.

The controller-side helper path also needed hardening: Windmill no longer reliably answers `jobs/run_wait_result/p/...` by script path, so `scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py` now submits by script path, falls back to a script hash when necessary, polls `jobs_u/get/<job_id>`, and degrades cleanly when the richer YAML-backed retry and timeout registries are unavailable under plain `python3`.

Before the schedule helper repair landed, `f/lv3/scheduler_watchdog_loop_every_10s` had to be re-enabled once through the Windmill API so the runtime matched the repo intent. The successful helper-based converge now preserves that `enabled: true` contract without the earlier raw SQL flag patching.

A one-time API probe temporarily wrote placeholder summary and `dsn` values onto `f/lv3/world_state/refresh_container_inventory_every_minute` while testing the update endpoint against a late-arriving script target. The successful replay restored the repo-managed schedule summary, description, `script_path`, and real runtime `dsn` value.

This receipt keeps the original `2026-03-28` identifier from the first branch-local live-apply file, but its verification block and metadata were refreshed on 2026-03-29 after replaying the converge and then rebasing the branch cleanly onto the current origin/main `0.177.65` baseline.
